title: Crispy Light Herbal Stir-fry
description: A light and crisp Brazilian dish featuring capers, bhuna spices, and a touch of freshness to make it pescatarian-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1 tsp bhuna spice blend (or 1 tsp chili powder + 1 tsp coriander seeds)

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add tofu and cook until golden, about 5 minutes.
Add onion slices and broccoli florets to the pan. Stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes until vegetables start to soften slightly.
Remove tofu from the pan and set aside. In the same pan, add capers and bhuna spice blend (or chili powder + coriander seeds). Cook for about 1 minute to toast spices slightly.
Return the tofu to the pan with a few tablespoons of soy sauce. Pour in lemon juice and stir well to combine all ingredients.
Finish by sprinkling parsley over everything before serving hot.
